channel.title: Posts on 7 miles 8 miles
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 7 miles 8 miles

item.title: Hugo_setting
item.description: Seite erstellen hugo download git download hugo new site quickstart cd quickstart git init vim config-toml to set the baseUrl git submodule add https://github.com/zwbetz-gh/papercss-hugo-theme.git themes/papercss-hugo-theme hugo –theme=papercss-hugo-theme –buildDrafts cd public git init git add . git commit -m"" git remote add origin http… git push -u origin master aktualisieren cd blogfolder hugo –theme=papercss-hugo-theme –buildDrafts cd public git add . git status git commit -m "" git push
